reference: I experienced pain a week ago in my lower left abdomen. It worsened and then subsided and went away. Today, exactly a week later, it returned but did not subside for hours, developing into a dull, uncomfortable ache. This was coupled with a sharp, shooting pain in my vagina. I occasionally get ovarian cysts; could this be the cause?
text: By experience, I knew my lower left abdomen was bursting and most excitable. Today, exactly a week later, it returned but did not subside for hours, developing into a dull, uncomfortable ache. This was coupled with a sharp shooting pain in my vagina. I occasionally get ovarian cysts. Could this be the cause?
